lines.line: Down through ensnaring soft coils of silken black foamy
Bile with rancorous, rotting with forgetful lies —
promises
Deny the cloying sense breathing out biting, malicious,
underwhelming
Spite for once wanted, now feared now forever done once
again with me
Trellises climbed, eschewed dreams, and the fucking always
Scream and it stands for you to cower against for some
structure in this
Sand-swept ruin, flit from me should I near, blue eyes on
blue eyes, shame
Drives your swift darts through this land once beyond
the dream we share
Jumping above and far behind from before my eyes,
blinked foolishly
Death in your stare, carelessly staying execution with
turning, smiling lips
Mirth in single humming note, sung from this world's
earth, our shared immortal soul in
Dry, lonely desert winter with air choked with ethereal
gray sand, hiding my forever everything
Elaine
Light risen, dawn warms again, the beckoning ball of fire,
Cold, elusive always. Drowning in pale blue light I fear
That my soul, torn apart, now relinquishing whatever
Hide from the cold sun. Now drowning, watching the
Sky vanish beneath descending azure, drowning in
Skies that sew bliss, sorrow, and fear into creatures within
Their own world, divine redemption found in mine
Can I have place in your life, but a simple, dead, drowned
angel?
Staring for whate'er belongs in, is found within that mirror
skewed along
Bedroom wall. Yet I see it within gilt, my reflection replete
with the
Weight of my devotion. Too corporeal to house plain longing.
And I will not be left to break. A phantom, mocking me for
wanting more
And within it, All I lost when I gave myself to death, this
thing
That has the damn'd thing I would have kept.
Tiring of appetites sour, so bland with over-consumption so I
Taste in the fog loving scents. Slowly breathing in, notes
sing across the air
"Taste me for that is all before you, after you, at this
time. You feed so I
Strengthen with that always perfect tortured need you will
never escape. So, you,
Leech clutched to his nymph, Goddess. Slide into my roots,
given consumption of
Basis of my place in this world. Partake from Goddess the
foundations of
Presence, all lost always to my love's consuming passion.
Bound with your passion, you will find all you needed,
the agony in
Lust, longing, desire. A golden thread sewn once too many
loops through your
Trapped soul, forever a captive to your hubris. You once
thought you can
Take immortal sin for idly weaving dreams of love. Trapped,
warning, caution
To those who would tempt the same. Not mine. No, a jailer
who caged himself
And now has lost the key."
That longing appetite knows no bounds. So Mistress Lea is a
being as Goddess, and within
Dark cloistered niches hide my Mistress's role before the sun.
I, her bonne, she the
Carnal pleasure from consuming Plaything's soul. Bitten and
swallowed, enveloped with all
That I long to make mine, bitten doesn't by far express this
pain, always consumed by her mouth
That is no tooth-strewn, tongue-swept, place for a simple
sustenance. Soul.
Goddess's soul consumes me.  But no, Lea won't swallow what
I am. No longer known as Mistress
Lea is now grown from my need, my love, desire for submission.
It devours me.
Belonging to Mistress is everything. Nursed from knowledge I am
utterly and fore'er belonging
To Mistress has since bored in through my heart-mind belonging to
Mistress is how
Best I've secured her favor for my displays, belonging to Mistress
as I play with her dick, moan my
Need,  never cumming for truth is in heart's blood not cock's belonging
to Mistress, though it does.
Too far have words fallen beneath the truth they once sprung from. I
corrupted, I fear, what I merely
Wanted you to know.
Notes, melodiously rising, dancing amongst themselves
Desires all, born of exposed soul, a plaything's music box
Daylife, mundane, charmed beguiling life. Perfumed with
Updrafts of color, wispy love, need so frightened you only
Could be certain – this wasn't sufficient for your breath flying
And your soft breath ensnares notes of your plaything's soul,
Daylife, mundane, charmed beguiling life. Perfumed with
Lost wishes, desires forsook, remembered only by my soul's
Endlessly spun song, music it makes for you.
Smug, soft laughter or a blushing smile. Take them as
Impetus for any action. Neither right nor wrong
Hold meaning. It is yours, your music my soul makes,
It will elicit a reaction, a gift for you.
Need is the term, word or not. That weighs, insists, and recognizes.
Can one search beyond the world? Beyond space? Beyond mind? Beyond soul?
Do these not construe enough? Better than plenty, they lay before us.
Do you think likely to accept interiors as these, becoming home
Do you worry because you want? It is you that is theirs
Decorator? No. Interior, camera and study, more still
Deserving, gracious understudy, upon noose, still hands and sky sad eye
To wing flown triumph, a swift sojourn spun from master's straining contempt.
Beneath misted violet clouds fancy dances with sterile sadness
Dreams grown into vows. Shared, broken lies cry hate, even then
Not with help. Caring, insane from sorrow. Golden, a key without lock
Keeps so many senseless, screaming secrets.
